flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at College of Eastern Idaho rose 23% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.8k → $12.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at College of Eastern Idaho fell 21% between 2006 and 2009 (47.4% → 37.3%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 16 pp at College of Eastern Idaho vs the 2003–2007 baseline (35.3% vs 51.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of Eastern Idaho fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).
